rules.name: Unsafely Interpolated wpdb Query
rules.description: SQL string interpolation in $wpdb->query can allow injection.

rules.name: Unescaped Superglobal Echo
rules.description: Direct echo of superglobal data should be escaped before output.

rules.name: Nopriv AJAX Endpoint
rules.description: wp_ajax_nopriv handlers require explicit capability and nonce controls.
